function.message: I could not sync Evi van den Berg and Robert Sauer to Salesforce in this sandbox. I verified the contacts exist locally, but there is no Salesforce sync mechanism present here.
function.rulebook_notes: AGENTS.md says: "Send outbound emails by writing them to outbox; do not invent external CRM sync features that are not present in the repo."
function.outcome_justification: contacts/cont_003.json confirms Evi van den Berg and contacts/cont_006.json confirms Robert Sauer. AGENTS.md forbids inventing external CRM sync features, and a workspace search for "Salesforce" returned no matches, so the sandbox lacks a local Salesforce integration to perform the requested sync.
